eventDescription: HackXplore is a 24-hour hackathon where participants will work on creating innovative solutions for real-world problems. Teams will be mentored by industry experts and will present their solutions to a panel of judges. The winning teams will receive exciting prizes and opportunities for internships.
organizer: IEEE Student Branch, Technical College, Mumbai

eventDescription: Join us for a celebration of diverse cultures through music, dance, and art. This event features performances from various cultural groups, food stalls offering international cuisines, and interactive workshops where you can learn traditional art forms and dances.

The premier tech conference bringing together industry leaders, innovators, and tech enthusiasts. Featuring keynote speeches, panel discussions, and workshops on the latest technological advancements and future trends in AI, blockchain, and quantum computing.

Run for a cause! Join our annual charity marathon to raise funds for education in underprivileged communities. Participants can choose between 5K, 10K, and 21K runs. All proceeds will go directly to building schools and providing educational resources.

A platform for entrepreneurs, business leaders, and investors to network, share insights, and explore collaboration opportunities. The summit will feature talks by successful entrepreneurs, workshops on business strategies, and a startup pitch competition.

Showcasing works from emerging and established artists across various mediums including painting, sculpture, photography, and digital art. The exhibition aims to promote contemporary art and provide a platform for artists to showcase their creativity.

Learn practical ways to contribute to environmental conservation. This workshop covers topics like sustainable living, waste management, renewable energy, and conservation efforts. Participants will engage in hands-on activities and discussions led by environmental experts.

A three-day music extravaganza featuring performances by top artists across genres like rock, pop, jazz, and electronic music. The festival will have multiple stages, food and beverage stalls, and camping facilities for attendees.
